overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a futuristic apartment. The character walks through a cyberpunk-styled bedroom featuring neon lighting, examining a desk workstation before heading toward an exit door. The environment features modern sci-fi furniture and a cool blue-green color palette.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily from the bed area toward the computer workstation on the opposite side of the room

entered.detail: sleek white angular desk with glowing computer monitor and keyboard
ergonomic black office chair with wheels
tall window with horizontal blinds letting in bright external light
tall units with multiple drawers and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic bedroom toward a desk workstation. The room features cool neon lighting, a gray sectional sofa, and modern storage furniture. As the character approaches the desk, the computer monitor and office chair come into view, while the bed recedes behind.

events.description: character turns around at the desk and begins walking toward the exit door

agents.ego_description: turning away from the desk and walking toward the room's exit door, passing the bed area on the left

entered.detail: metal door frame with illuminated red EXIT sign above
large wall art depicting rocky desert terrain
rectangular air conditioning vent mounted on wall
white climate control unit below the painting
tall curved lamp with white shade near the bed

segments.scene_description: After reaching the desk, the character turns and walks toward the room's exit. The camera reveals a desert landscape painting and an exit door with a red sign. The bed reappears on the left side as the character moves through the space, passing modern furnishings and neon lighting fixtures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cyberpunk bedroom that shifts from a focus on a high-tech workstation to the room's exit. It begins with the character walking past a gray sectional sofa and modern storage units under cool neon lighting, moving steadily toward a desk workstation. As the character reaches the desk, the computer monitor and office chair come into clear view while the bed recedes into the background. The camera then pivots as the character turns away from the workstation, gliding past the bed once more to reveal a desert landscape painting on the wall. The scene finally opens up toward the room's exit, passing final neon fixtures before arriving at a door marked with a red sign.
